name: @netsirk/chip
description: CLI for AI coding agents — structured persistence for features, phases, tasks, sessions, findings and acceptance criteria backed by SQLite
author: netsirk

scripts.build: tsup && rm -rf dist/migrations && cp -r drizzle dist/migrations && cp -r src/templates dist/templates
scripts.build:win: tsup && rm -rf dist/migrations && cp -R drizzle dist/migrations && cp -R src/templates dist/templates
scripts.release: bun run typecheck && bun run test && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && bun run release
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && bun run release
scripts.release:major: npm version major && bun run release
